title: euphorbia teheranica
intro: Euphorbia teheranica, also known as the Iranian spurge, is a species of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to Iran. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Euphorbia teheranica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia teheranica are typically made by drying the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and ointments for topical application.
